volume_requirements: ./memory mounted RW at /app/memory — project data and PRD files
./.agents mounted RO at /app/.agents — SKILL.md source files for load_skill
./skills mounted RO at /app/skills — local corpus docs
namespace_rules: Namespaces must match ^[a-z0-9-]+$ and be 3-40 chars
Reserved system directories under memory/: prd, skills
Each project needs bootstrap via scripts/setup-project.ts
